title: Limit system access to authorized users
description: The system must restrict access to authorized users, processes acting on behalf of authorized users, and authorized devices.

checks.name: Enabled Local Users
checks.command: wmic useraccount where disabled=false get name

expected_result: Only approved and documented users are members of privileged groups and enabled accounts are authorized.
remediation: Remove unauthorized users from privileged groups and disable or delete unauthorized accounts.
